name: Eggplant Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 3 cup Tightly Packed Fresh Spinach (About 1/4 Lb.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make several half-inch slits on the eggplant. Insert garlic slices.
2. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Let cool.
3. Peel and cut into 1-inch cubes.
4. Cut the pepper in half lengthwise.
5. Place the pepper, skin side up, on a baking sheet.
6. Flatten with the palm of your hand.
7. Broil 3 inches from the heat for 10 minutes, or until charred.
8. Remove from water, peel and discard skins.
9. Add eggplant, pepper, tomatoes, thyme, and salt to food processor; process until chopped.
10. Stuff each shell with one-third cup of the mixture.
11. Place stuffed shells in a baking dish coated with cooking spray.
12. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
13. Wash the processor bowl and blade.
14. Combine spinach, cottage cheese, lemon juice, and pepper in the food processor; process until smooth.
15. Spoon the spinach mixture over the shells and sprinkle with Parmesan.
16. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
Yield: 4 Servings (About 203 Calories per 2 Shells and One-Third Cup Sauce.)
